title: Essencial Edition
description: A server-friendly, optimized Vanilla+ modpack delivering a simple adventure with the perfect aesthetic for an authentic Minecraft experience.
body:
![Título](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ce55e104d97691a0e44a4716fbacbfacf9664fc.png)
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### Description:

**_A modpack that will reignite your desire to start a fresh new adventure!_**

A Vanilla+ overhaul to enhance your experience and make the game more immersive! Optimized for most computers. Key features include:

- New **Action&Stuff-Like Textures**
- **Fresh Animations**
- **Optimized Shaders**
- Vanilla & **Immersive World Generation**
- **New Dungeons** and enhanced vanilla structures
- Improved **Archaeology Mechanics**
- **Backport** of future version features
- TONS of **Mob Variations**
- **Distant Horizons!**
- Revamped **End Dimension** Mechanics
- Connected Textures
- **Create Mod** integration!
- HUD Improvements
- New **Armor Trim Materials**
- **Major Trim Mechanic Overhaul** (each material adds unique armor effects)
- Enhanced Hostile Mobs
- Herobrine Removed
- And much more!
  
### New Trim Material Effects:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Trim Effects:

- Amethyst - Brewer's Dream
- Armadillo Scute - Fire Resistance + Resistance
- Blaze Rod - Fire Resistance + Slow Falling
- Bone - Night Vision + Strength
- Bottle o' Enchantingee - Glowing + Luck
- Breeze Rod - Jump Boost + Slow Falling
- Coal - Haste + Speed
- Copper - Electrifying + Resistance
- Diamond - Miner's Rush + Fortune + Health Boost + Strength
- Dragon Breath - Share Effect Radius
- Echo Shard - Echoing 
- Emmerald - Trade Discount
- End Crystal - Health Boost
- Ender Pearl - More Projectile Dodge Chance + Hydrophobic
- Fire Charge - Fire Aspect + Firey Thorns + Fire Resistance
- Glow Ink Sac - Glowing
- Glowstone Dust - Glowing
- Gold - Piglins Ignore You + Sun's Blessing
- Gunpowder - Jump Boost + Strength
- Heart oh the Sea - Conduit Power + Health Boost
- Honeycomb - Luck + Regeneration
- Iron - Item Magnet + Haste + Absorption + Strength
- Lapis Lazuli - Enchanter's Favour 
- Leather - Light Footed + When on Boots: Can walk on powdered snow
- Nautilus Shell - Fire Resistance + Resistance + Absorption
- Nether Brick - Fire Resisitance + Cleaving + Strength
- Nether Quartz - Bonus XP
- Nether Star - Fire Resistance + Haste + Health Boost + Resistance + Strength
- Netherite - Fire Resistance + Resistance + Trimmed items cannot burn + Strength
- Netherite Scrap - Fire Resistance + Strength
- Phantom Membrane - Night Vision + Slow Falling
- Popped Chorus Fruit - Dodge Chance
- Prismarine Crystals - Dolphins Grace + Water Breathing
- Prismarine Shard - Swim Speed + Thorns + Respiration
- Rabbit Hide - Haste + Jump Boost + Speed
- Redstone - Movement Speed + Step Height + Haste
- Slime Ball - Knockback Resistance + Knockback + When on Boots: +1 Bouncy + Oozing
- Turtle Scute - Luck + Regeneration + Resistance + Water Breathing

News Effects descriptions can be found in [Better Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettertrims) / [Trims Effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/trimseffects) mod Pages.

</details>


_This is an independently developed modpack – suggestions welcome in the comments! :D_

– Beto
